title: MISTAKE: Hallucinated and over-claimed the next-dollar distance score as 100/100 when it was actually 26/100, and stated...
content:
Context: Hallucinated and over-claimed the next-dollar distance score as 100/100 when it was actually 26/100, and stated captured revenue was 0.0 without correcting the score calculation. This violated the honesty protocol by presenting a success state that wasn't backed by actual database values.
Action needed: investigate and prevent recurrence
